## Checklist
- [ ] I have reviewed the [Contributing Guidelines](https://github.com/instancio/instancio/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] An issue was created and discussed before submitting this PR
- [ ] Code has been reviewed and cleaned up (including any AI-generated code)
- [ ] Follows project naming conventions and coding style
- [ ] Tests have been added or updated as appropriate
- [ ] Documentation and examples have been updated as appropriate
- [ ] Commits have been squashed and the branch is rebased onto `main`
